summary: Tested PDF facturation corrections and responsive mobile features. PDF structure is correct (no Code column, title+description in same cell, Total TTC on single line). CRITICAL BUG: PDF generation fails with LayoutError for very long descriptions (>30 lines). Mobile responsive for Campaigns page works (tabs show as icons). Settings Email Templates tab is functional.

critical.issue: LayoutError when description is very long (>30 lines). Error: 'tallest cell X points, too large on page Y in frame'. The table cell cannot split across pages.
critical.root_cause: ReportLab Table with long Paragraph in cell cannot split across pages. Need to use splitFirst=True or split long descriptions manually.
critical.test_case: Create devis with 50-line description, then download PDF -> 520 Internal Server Error

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: In /app/backend/routes/invoices.py, modify PDF generation to handle very long descriptions. Options: 1) Use Table with splitByRow=True and splitFirst=True, 2) Split long descriptions into multiple rows, 3) Truncate descriptions with '...' after certain length
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation in invoices.py line ~273-380 uses ReportLab Table which cannot split cells across pages by default. When a cell (Désignation with long description) exceeds page height, LayoutError is thrown.
The fix should use Table(..., splitByRow=True) and ensure Paragraph elements can flow across pages
seed_data_creation: Created test devis DEV-2026-0025 (moderate description) and DEV-2026-0026 (very long description - causes PDF error)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation works for normal descriptions but fails for very long ones (>30 lines). The LayoutError in ReportLab needs to be fixed. Test with DEV-2026-0026 to verify fix. Mobile responsive for Campaigns and AI Assistant pages is working. Settings Email Templates tab is functional.

verified_features.pdf_no_code_column: PASS - Table headers are: Désignation, Qté, Remise, P.U. HT, TVA, Total HT
verified_features.pdf_title_description_same_cell: PASS - Title in bold + description text in same Désignation cell
verified_features.pdf_total_ttc_single_line: PASS - Shows 'Montant total TTC: X €' on single line
verified_features.pdf_calculations_correct: PASS - Qté × PU HT - Remise = Total HT, TVA 8.5%, Total TTC
verified_features.campaigns_mobile_responsive: PASS - Tabs show as icons on mobile (390x844)
verified_features.settings_email_templates: PASS - Tab functional with devis/facture templates
